required_preferences.fact: Customizes all office dinner meal orders to include iron-rich options (like lean beef, lentils, or leafy greens) — tracks iron content and prioritizes vitamin C pairings to boost absorption

supersedes.fact: Eats dinner at the office lounge after finishing client meetings—prefers hot meals delivered to the building rather than cooking or eating at home during the week

required_preferences.fact: Shops for household essentials in-person at local London stores and open markets to adapt to local brands and supply options

supersedes.fact: Orders household supplies online bi-weekly, never shops in-store for essentials

required_preferences.fact: Consistently sets a daily evening reminder to take her prescribed iron supplement with food — never skips, and always takes it separately from coffee or dairy products as instructed to maximize absorption.
Prioritizes collaborative feedback with co-leads after each training session, conducting immediate debriefs to refine content and delivery for future sessions
Spends Sunday mornings exploring new coffee shops downtown — never repeats the same spot twice in a month
Priors short, daily power naps over long nightly sleep blocks to cope with disrupted sleep cycles during intense deal sprints

persona: A junior corporate lawyer at a multinational firm specializing in mergers and acquisitions
